Home · Cookie Policy

Cookie Policy

Last updated: [DATE]
Legal review required. This policy is a working draft. It should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel in Qatar before being relied upon as a binding legal document.

1. What cookies are

Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device. This site also uses browser local storage and session storage for a small number of essential preferences. Together, we call these "storage items". Some are strictly necessary for the site to work; others are set only with your consent.

2. Storage items we use

Strictly necessary

These are required for basic functionality and cannot be disabled. They are not set for tracking or advertising purposes.

NameTypePurposeLifetime
naa-consent-v1 localStorage Records your cookie-consent choice (accept all, essential only, or custom). 12 months
naa-chat-session-v1 sessionStorage Keeps your active chat conversation while you browse. Until browser tab closed
naa-chat-seen sessionStorage Prevents the "new chat" pulse animation from replaying every page load. Until browser tab closed

Functional

These remember choices you make to personalise your experience.

NameTypePurposeLifetime
naa-chat-lang sessionStorage Remembers your chat language (English / Arabic). Until browser tab closed

Third-party (only loaded after you accept)

These are set by external services embedded in the site. They will not run unless you have accepted the corresponding category in the consent banner.

ProviderWhere it appearsWhat it sets
Google Maps Embedded office-location map on the Contact section. Google's own cookies; may include a NID cookie.
Calendly Embedded appointment / consultation booking widget. Calendly's own cookies for session and booking state.
Google Analytics 4 Aggregate, anonymised traffic analytics across the site. _ga, _ga_* - up to 2 years.

You can read each provider's own policy: Google · Calendly.

3. Managing your preferences

You can change your consent at any time. Click the button below (or the "Cookie settings" link in the footer) to reopen the preferences panel. Withdrawing consent will not affect any processing that took place before you withdrew it.

4. Browser controls

All major browsers let you block or delete cookies. Note that if you block essential storage items, some parts of the site (like the chat assistant) may not function correctly.

  • Chrome
  • Safari
  • Firefox
  • Edge

5. Changes

If we add new storage items or third-party embeds, we will update this page and, where required, ask for your consent again.

6. Contact

Questions about this Cookie Policy: info@nasseralaligroup.com · +974 6655 7728.
